product_overview: A FastAPI Python backend that converts URLs, websites, and PDFs into short-form brainrot-style vertical videos (1080x1920 MP4). It handles full pipeline: content ingestion (Firecrawl), AI script generation (CrewAI/OpenAI or ElevenLabs agents), TTS narration (ElevenLabs), subtitle rendering (ASS karaoke/single-word-pop), FFmpeg video compositing, blob storage, and engagement-based retention analytics and recommendations.
core_goals: Accept a URL or PDF and asynchronously produce a batch of 5-15 short vertical videos.
Stream real-time batch progress to clients via SSE events.
Provide a browsable library of generated shorts organized by chat session.
Track viewer engagement (watch time, likes, skips, mute, info opens) and derive retention-based recommendations.
Support both authenticated users (personal library) and guests (general shared library).
Allow asset management (gameplay clips, music, fonts) that feed into the render pipeline.

features.name: Batch Video Generation
features.description: Create a batch job from a URL or PDF, asynchronously ingest, script, narrate, render, and upload videos.
api_flows: POST /v1/batches with source_url or uploaded PDF -> Receive batch_id and initial items list -> GET /v1/batches/{batch_id}/events SSE stream to watch progress events (ingest, scripts_ready, render, upload, done) -> GET /v1/batches/{batch_id} to see final status
POST /v1/batches with invalid or missing source_url -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /v1/batches with count outside [5,15] range -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /v1/batches/{batch_id} for non-existent batch_id -> Receive 404 not found
GET /v1/batches/{batch_id}/items/{item_id}/video for uploaded item -> Receive video stream (206 partial or 200)
POST /v1/batches/{batch_id}/retry -> Re-queue only failed items in the batch

features.name: Asset Management
features.description: Upload and manage gameplay clips, music tracks, and font files used during video rendering.
api_flows: POST /v1/assets with multipart file upload (gameplay clip MP4) and metadata -> Receive AssetRecord with id, kind, path, tags
POST /v1/assets with unsupported file type -> Receive 400 or 422 error
POST /v1/assets with music file -> Receive AssetRecord with kind=MUSIC
POST /v1/assets with font file -> Receive AssetRecord with kind=FONT

features.name: Agent Management
features.description: Bootstrap and proxy ElevenLabs producer/narrator agents; handle script bundle webhooks.
api_flows: POST /v1/agents/bootstrap -> Bootstrap ElevenLabs agents with current settings, receive agent IDs
POST /v1/agents/custom-llm/chat with valid ElevenLabs LLM payload -> Proxy to OpenAI and return chat completion response
POST /v1/agents/custom-llm/responses with valid payload -> Proxy to OpenAI responses API
POST /v1/agents/webhook/elevenlabs with valid HMAC signature and script bundle -> Submit bundle to waiting producer, return 200
POST /v1/agents/webhook/elevenlabs with invalid HMAC signature -> Return 401 unauthorized

features.name: Video Edit Preview
features.description: Allow users to preview video output with custom subtitle style, gameplay, and narration before committing to a full batch.
api_flows: GET /v1/video-edit/options -> Return available subtitle presets and gameplay assets
POST /v1/video-edit/previews with valid item_id and preset overrides -> Return preview record with preview_id
GET /v1/video-edit/previews/{preview_id}/video -> Stream the preview MP4

features.name: Chat Management
features.description: Organize batches under named chat sessions; scope to authenticated user or general library for guests.
api_flows: POST /v1/chats with title and source metadata -> Return ChatEnvelope with chat_id
GET /v1/chats with bearer token -> Return only the authenticated user's chats
GET /v1/chats without bearer token -> Return general library chats (guest scope)
GET /v1/chats/{chat_id} -> Return single chat with export summary and cover metadata
GET /v1/chats/{chat_id} for non-existent chat_id -> Return 404
GET /v1/chats with invalid bearer token -> Return 401

features.name: Shorts Library
features.description: Retrieve generated short videos for a chat, with full render metadata.
api_flows: GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/shorts -> Return list of BatchItems with output_url, render_metadata (subtitle style, font, gameplay, thumbnail)
GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/shorts for chat with no items -> Return empty items list
GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/shorts with auth token for another user's private chat -> Return 403 or empty list

features.name: Engagement Tracking
features.description: Accept viewer engagement events for analytics and recommendation training.
api_flows: POST /v1/chats/{chat_id}/engagement with valid payload (watch_time_seconds, completion_ratio, liked, etc.) -> Return 200 and record engagement
POST /v1/chats/{chat_id}/engagement with duplicate (viewer_id, session_id, item_id) -> Deduplicate silently (no double-count)
POST /v1/chats/{chat_id}/engagement with missing required fields -> Return 422
POST /v1/chats/{chat_id}/engagement for non-existent chat -> Return 404

features.name: Recommendation Analytics
features.description: Return retention-based recommendations for optimal gameplay, caption, and text style.
api_flows: GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/recommendations?session_id={id} with enough tracked reels -> Return has_enough_data=true with top_gameplay, top_caption_styles, top_text_styles, winning_profile
GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/recommendations?session_id={id} with too few reels tracked -> Return has_enough_data=false, reels_tracked < min_reels_required
GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/recommendations for non-existent chat -> Return 404
GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/recommendations without session_id -> Return 422 or empty session result

features.name: Health & Auth
features.description: Service health check and request authentication.
api_flows: GET /health -> Return {status: ok} with 200
Any authenticated endpoint without bearer token -> Falls back to guest scope (not 401)
Any authenticated endpoint with malformed JWT -> Return 401
